name: Blueberry Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Lemon or orange peel, grated
1/4 tsp Lemon or orange peel, grated
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 375°F. Prepare a baking sheet with cooking spray. To prepare the batter, combine flour, brown sugar, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt in a mixing bowl. Using a pastry blender, cut in margarine until pieces are the size of small peas. In another mixing bowl, combine egg white, milk, lemon or orange peel, and blueberries. Mix dry ingredients with wet ingredients just until moistened. Drop dough from a rounded tablespoon about 2 inches apart on the prepared baking sheet. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes or until edges are set and lightly browned.
Meanwhile, to prepare the frosting, combine powdered sugar, 1 tablespoon margarine, lemon or orange peel, and enough water to make a spreading consistency.
